ModMetaData.name: Morrowind Menus
ModMetaData.author: Vyberware
ModMetaData.description: Morrowind Menus replaces the pawn gear tab with a Morrowind inspired layout featuring tabs, organized item categories, equipment slots, and a character stats view. All trading, stockpile, role, and inventory shuffling systems have been removed so normal RimWorld logistics behave as usual.
